sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6950" key="a)nalfa/bhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναλφάβητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n6950.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not knowing one's a b c,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0480.tlg001:2D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nicoch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
